title: Streaming Algorithm Apology
text:
## Streaming Algorithm Apology

**Subject:** We are sorry we recommended that

Dear {person},

Our algorithm noticed you watched one {adjective} {noun} and assumed you wanted {number} hours of {plural noun}.

**What happened:** While you were {verb ending in -ing}, we auto-played a {color} documentary about {plural noun}.

**Our mistake:** Someone {past-tense verb} the settings during a {adjective} update.

**Fix:** Your queue now includes {number} {adjective} {job} biopics and one {food} tutorial.

**Compensation:** One free month and a {object} sticker.

We promise to stop {verb ending in -ing} your {emotion}.
